MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Mohammed Nazam, is present. Represented by Leonna Luckette
Attorney, Arnold Evje, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Thomas Holland and Robin Holland, are present.
Attorney, Noelle Formosa, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Conroy, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of DEC-13-2010 is vacated.
